prompt: Build a simple 2-slide IBM Carbon PPTX. First slide is a programmatic title (no HTML capture needed). Second slide has 3 metric callout cards showing KPIs with gradient top accent bars. Use the green/teal/blue Carbon accent colors. The deck should be called 'Q4-Performance-Review.pptx'.

assertions.text: Uses gradient color triplets from the skill table
No gradient fill objects (only solid fills + SVG workaround)
